name: site-world
description: Agency-grade website builder as an agent skill: brief → style tiles → section-library assembly → screenshot QA loop.

plugins.name: site-world
plugins.description: Build a complete premium website through an enforced pipeline: creative-brief interview, pick-one-of-three style tiles frozen into design tokens, page blueprint assembled from a curated library of self-contained section templates, and a Playwright screenshot QA loop scored against a rubric — nothing ships until it passes. Output is plain static HTML/CSS/JS.
